mechanics.excerpt: If character disguising himself has par- ticularly bad roll_ the gamemaster may reveal this fact to the character as soon as he looks in Mirror: To penetrate disguise the character making the attempt makes Disguise Skill Check: If the character does not have Disguise Skill; he may make an untrained Skill Check as normal, but he also gets to add his Perception Skill Bonus t0 his roll Note that Disguise only affects character' $ physical appearance_ character who wants t0 alter nis behavior and mannerisms must use the Acting Skill (see 96).
